contents:
Require Import WildCat.Core WildCat.Prod WildCat.Equiv WildCat.NatTrans
  WildCat.Square WildCat.Opposite.

(** * Bifunctors between WildCats *)

(** ** Definition *)

(** We choose to store redundant information in the class, so that depending on how an instance is constructed, we will get the expected implementations of [fmap10], [fmap01] and [fmap11]. *)
Arguments is0functor01_bifunctor {A B C _ _ _} F {_} a : rename.
Arguments is0functor10_bifunctor {A B C _ _ _} F {_} b : rename.
(** We provide two alternate constructors, allowing the user to provide just the first field or the last two fields. *)

goals.conclusion: Is0Bifunctor F
Is0Bifunctor F
Is0Functor (uncurry F)
forall a : A, Is0Functor (F a)
forall b : B, Is0Functor (flip F b)
Is0Functor (uncurry F)
forall a : A, Is0Functor (F a)
forall b : B, Is0Functor (flip F b)
Is0Bifunctor F

hypotheses.type: forall b : B, Is0Functor (flip F b)

goals.conclusion: Is0Bifunctor F

hypotheses.type: forall b : B, Is0Functor (flip F b)

contents:
Definition fmap10 {A B C : Type} `{IsGraph A, IsGraph B, IsGraph C}
  (F : A -> B -> C) `{!Is0Bifunctor F} {a0 a1 : A} (f : a0 $-> a1) (b : B)
  : (F a0 b) $-> (F a1 b)
  := fmap (flip F b) f.

Definition fmap01 {A B C : Type} `{IsGraph A, IsGraph B, IsGraph C}
  (F : A -> B -> C) `{!Is0Bifunctor F} (a : A) {b0 b1 : B} (g : b0 $-> b1)
  : F a b0 $-> F a b1
  := fmap (F a) g.

Definition fmap11 {A B C : Type} `{IsGraph A, IsGraph B, IsGraph C}
  (F : A -> B -> C) `{!Is0Bifunctor F} {a0 a1 : A} (f : a0 $-> a1)
  {b0 b1 : B} (g : b0 $-> b1)
  : F a0 b0 $-> F a1 b1
  := fmap_pair (uncurry F) f g.
(** As with [Is0Bifunctor], we store redundant information.  In addition, we store the proofs that they are consistent with each other. *)
Arguments Is1Bifunctor {A B C _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _} F {Is0Bifunctor} : rename.
Arguments is1functor01_bifunctor {A B C _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _} F {_ _} a : rename.
Arguments is1functor10_bifunctor {A B C _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _} F {_ _} b : rename.

Arguments fmap11_is_fmap01_fmap10 {A B C _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _} F
  {Is0Bifunctor Is1Bifunctor} {a0 a1} f {b0 b1} g : rename.

Arguments fmap11_is_fmap10_fmap01 {A B C _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _} F
  {Is0Bifunctor Is1Bifunctor} {a0 a1} f {b0 b1} g : rename.
(** We again provide two alternate constructors. *)

goals.conclusion: Is1Bifunctor F
Is1Bifunctor F
Is1Functor (uncurry F)
forall a : A, Is1Functor (F a)
forall b : B, Is1Functor (flip F b)

forall (a0 a1 : A) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap11 F f g $== fmap01 F a1 g $o fmap10 F f b0

forall (a0 a1 : A) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap11 F f g $== fmap10 F f b1 $o fmap01 F a0 g
Is1Functor (uncurry F)
forall a : A, Is1Functor (F a)
forall b : B, Is1Functor (flip F b)

forall (a0 a1 : A) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap11 F f g $== fmap01 F a1 g $o fmap10 F f b0

contents: intros a0 a1 f b0 b1 g.

goals.conclusion: fmap11 F f g $== fmap01 F a1 g $o fmap10 F f b0

contents: refine (_^$ $@ fmap_pair_comp (uncurry F) f (Id b0) (Id a1) g).

goals.conclusion: fmap_pair (uncurry F) (Id a1 $o f) (g $o Id b0) $-> fmap11 F f g

forall (a0 a1 : A) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap11 F f g $== fmap10 F f b1 $o fmap01 F a0 g

contents: intros a0 a1 f b0 b1 g.

goals.conclusion: fmap11 F f g $== fmap10 F f b1 $o fmap01 F a0 g

contents: refine (_^$ $@ fmap_pair_comp (uncurry F) (Id a0) g f (Id b1)).

goals.conclusion: fmap_pair (uncurry F) (f $o Id a0) (Id b1 $o g) $-> fmap11 F f g
Is1Bifunctor F

hypotheses.type: forall b : B, Is0Functor (flip F b)
forall b : B, Is1Functor (flip F b)

forall (a0 a1 : A) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap01 F a1 g $o fmap10 F f b0 $== fmap10 F f b1 $o fmap01 F a0 g

goals.conclusion: Is1Bifunctor F

hypotheses.type: forall b : B, Is0Functor (flip F b)
forall b : B, Is1Functor (flip F b)

forall (a0 a1 : A) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap01 F a1 g $o fmap10 F f b0 $== fmap10 F f b1 $o fmap01 F a0 g

goals.conclusion: Is1Functor (uncurry F)

hypotheses.type: forall b : B, Is0Functor (flip F b)
forall b : B, Is1Functor (flip F b)

forall (a0 a1 : A) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap01 F a1 g $o fmap10 F f b0 $== fmap10 F f b1 $o fmap01 F a0 g

goals.conclusion: forall a : A, Is1Functor (F a)

hypotheses.type: forall b : B, Is0Functor (flip F b)
forall b : B, Is1Functor (flip F b)

forall (a0 a1 : A) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap01 F a1 g $o fmap10 F f b0 $== fmap10 F f b1 $o fmap01 F a0 g

goals.conclusion: forall b : B, Is1Functor (flip F b)

hypotheses.type: forall b : B, Is0Functor (flip F b)
forall b : B, Is1Functor (flip F b)

forall (a0 a1 : A) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap01 F a1 g $o fmap10 F f b0 $== fmap10 F f b1 $o fmap01 F a0 g

goals.conclusion:
forall (a0 a1 : A) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap11 F f g $== fmap01 F a1 g $o fmap10 F f b0

hypotheses.type: forall b : B, Is0Functor (flip F b)
forall b : B, Is1Functor (flip F b)

forall (a0 a1 : A) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap01 F a1 g $o fmap10 F f b0 $== fmap10 F f b1 $o fmap01 F a0 g

goals.conclusion:
forall (a0 a1 : A) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap11 F f g $== fmap10 F f b1 $o fmap01 F a0 g

hypotheses.type: forall b : B, Is0Functor (flip F b)
forall b : B, Is1Functor (flip F b)

forall (a0 a1 : A) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap01 F a1 g $o fmap10 F f b0 $== fmap10 F f b1 $o fmap01 F a0 g

goals.conclusion: Is1Functor (uncurry F)

hypotheses.type: forall b : B, Is0Functor (flip F b)
forall b : B, Is1Functor (flip F b)

forall (a0 a1 : A) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap01 F a1 g $o fmap10 F f b0 $== fmap10 F f b1 $o fmap01 F a0 g

goals.conclusion: forall a : A, Is1Functor (F a)

hypotheses.type: forall b : B, Is0Functor (flip F b)
forall b : B, Is1Functor (flip F b)

forall (a0 a1 : A) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap01 F a1 g $o fmap10 F f b0 $== fmap10 F f b1 $o fmap01 F a0 g

goals.conclusion: forall b : B, Is1Functor (flip F b)

hypotheses.type: forall b : B, Is0Functor (flip F b)
forall b : B, Is1Functor (flip F b)

forall (a0 a1 : A) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap01 F a1 g $o fmap10 F f b0 $== fmap10 F f b1 $o fmap01 F a0 g

goals.conclusion:
forall (a0 a1 : A) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap11 F f g $== fmap01 F a1 g $o fmap10 F f b0

hypotheses.type: forall b : B, Is0Functor (flip F b)
forall b : B, Is1Functor (flip F b)

forall (a0 a1 : A) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap01 F a1 g $o fmap10 F f b0 $== fmap10 F f b1 $o fmap01 F a0 g

contents: intros a0 a1 f b0 b1 g.

goals.conclusion: fmap11 F f g $== fmap01 F a1 g $o fmap10 F f b0

hypotheses.type: forall b : B, Is0Functor (flip F b)
forall b : B, Is1Functor (flip F b)

forall (a2 a3 : A) (f0 : a2 $-> a3) (b2 b3 : B) (g0 : b2 $-> b3),
fmap01 F a3 g0 $o fmap10 F f0 b2 $== fmap10 F f0 b3 $o fmap01 F a2 g0

contents: exact (bifunctor_coh a0 a1 f b0 b1 g)^$.

goals.conclusion:
forall (a0 a1 : A) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap11 F f g $== fmap10 F f b1 $o fmap01 F a0 g

hypotheses.type: forall b : B, Is0Functor (flip F b)
forall b : B, Is1Functor (flip F b)

forall (a0 a1 : A) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap01 F a1 g $o fmap10 F f b0 $== fmap10 F f b1 $o fmap01 F a0 g

contents:
Definition fmap01_id {A B C : Type} `{Is1Cat A, Is1Cat B, Is1Cat C}
  (F : A -> B -> C) `{!Is0Bifunctor F, !Is1Bifunctor F} (a : A) (b : B)
  : fmap01 F a (Id b) $== Id (F a b)
  := fmap_id (F a) b.

Definition fmap10_id {A B C : Type} `{Is1Cat A, Is1Cat B, Is1Cat C}
  (F : A -> B -> C) `{!Is0Bifunctor F, !Is1Bifunctor F} (a : A) (b : B)
  : fmap10 F (Id a) b $== Id (F a b)
  := fmap_id (flip F b) a.

Definition fmap11_id {A B C : Type} `{Is1Cat A, Is1Cat B, Is1Cat C}
  (F : A -> B -> C) `{!Is0Bifunctor F, !Is1Bifunctor F} (a : A) (b : B)
  : fmap11 F (Id a) (Id b) $== Id (F a b)
  := fmap_id (uncurry F) (a, b).
(** [fmap11] with left map the identity gives [fmap01]. *)
(** [fmap11] with right map the identity gives [fmap10]. *)

goals.conclusion: Is0Bifunctor (flip F)
Is0Bifunctor (flip F)
Is0Functor (uncurry (flip F))
forall a : B, Is0Functor (flip F a)
forall b : A, Is0Functor (flip (flip F) b)
Is0Functor (uncurry (flip F))
Is0Functor (uncurry F o equiv_prod_symm B A)
forall a : B, Is0Functor (flip F a)
forall b : A, Is0Functor (flip (flip F) b)
Is1Bifunctor (flip F)
Is1Bifunctor (flip F)
Is1Functor (uncurry (flip F))
forall a : B, Is1Functor (flip F a)
forall b : A, Is1Functor (flip (flip F) b)

forall (a0 a1 : B) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : A) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap11 (flip F) f g $== fmap01 (flip F) a1 g $o fmap10 (flip F) f b0

forall (a0 a1 : B) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : A) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap11 (flip F) f g $== fmap10 (flip F) f b1 $o fmap01 (flip F) a0 g
Is1Functor (uncurry (flip F))
Is1Functor (uncurry F o equiv_prod_symm B A)
forall a : B, Is1Functor (flip F a)
forall b : A, Is1Functor (flip (flip F) b)

forall (a0 a1 : B) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : A) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap11 (flip F) f g $== fmap01 (flip F) a1 g $o fmap10 (flip F) f b0

contents: intros b0 b1 g a0 a1 f.

goals.conclusion: fmap11 (flip F) g f $== fmap01 (flip F) b1 f $o fmap10 (flip F) g a0

forall (a0 a1 : B) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : A) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap11 (flip F) f g $== fmap10 (flip F) f b1 $o fmap01 (flip F) a0 g

contents: intros b0 b1 g a0 a1 f.

goals.conclusion: fmap11 (flip F) g f $== fmap10 (flip F) g a1 $o fmap01 (flip F) b0 f

contents:
(** ** Composition of bifunctors *)

(** There are 4 different ways to compose a functor with a bifunctor. *)

(** Restricting a functor along a bifunctor yields a bifunctor. *)

goals.conclusion: Is1Bifunctor (fun (a : A) (b : B) => G (F a b))
Is1Bifunctor (fun (a : A) (b : B) => G (F a b))
Is1Functor (uncurry (fun (a : A) (b : B) => G (F a b)))
forall a : A, Is1Functor ((fun (a0 : A) (b : B) => G (F a0 b)) a)
forall b : B, Is1Functor (flip (fun (a : A) (b0 : B) => G (F a b0)) b)

forall (a0 a1 : A) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap11 (fun (a : A) (b : B) => G (F a b)) f g $==
fmap01 (fun (a : A) (b : B) => G (F a b)) a1 g $o
fmap10 (fun (a : A) (b : B) => G (F a b)) f b0

forall (a0 a1 : A) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap11 (fun (a : A) (b : B) => G (F a b)) f g $==
fmap10 (fun (a : A) (b : B) => G (F a b)) f b1 $o
fmap01 (fun (a : A) (b : B) => G (F a b)) a0 g

forall (a0 a1 : A) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap11 (fun (a : A) (b : B) => G (F a b)) f g $==
fmap01 (fun (a : A) (b : B) => G (F a b)) a1 g $o
fmap10 (fun (a : A) (b : B) => G (F a b)) f b0

forall (a0 a1 : A) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap11 (fun (a : A) (b : B) => G (F a b)) f g $==
fmap10 (fun (a : A) (b : B) => G (F a b)) f b1 $o
fmap01 (fun (a : A) (b : B) => G (F a b)) a0 g

forall (a0 a1 : A) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap11 (fun (a : A) (b : B) => G (F a b)) f g $==
fmap01 (fun (a : A) (b : B) => G (F a b)) a1 g $o
fmap10 (fun (a : A) (b : B) => G (F a b)) f b0

contents: intros a0 a1 f b0 b1 g.

goals.conclusion:
fmap11 (fun (a : A) (b : B) => G (F a b)) f g $==
fmap01 (fun (a : A) (b : B) => G (F a b)) a1 g $o
fmap10 (fun (a : A) (b : B) => G (F a b)) f b0

contents: exact (fmap2 G (fmap11_is_fmap01_fmap10 F f g) $@ fmap_comp G _ _).

goals.conclusion:
forall (a0 a1 : A) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap11 (fun (a : A) (b : B) => G (F a b)) f g $==
fmap10 (fun (a : A) (b : B) => G (F a b)) f b1 $o
fmap01 (fun (a : A) (b : B) => G (F a b)) a0 g

contents: intros a0 a1 f b0 b1 g.

goals.conclusion:
fmap11 (fun (a : A) (b : B) => G (F a b)) f g $==
fmap10 (fun (a : A) (b : B) => G (F a b)) f b1 $o
fmap01 (fun (a : A) (b : B) => G (F a b)) a0 g

contents: exact (fmap2 G (fmap11_is_fmap10_fmap01 F f g) $@ fmap_comp G _ _).

goals.conclusion: Is0Bifunctor (fun (a : A) (b : E) => F (G a) (K b))
Is0Bifunctor (fun (a : A) (b : E) => F (G a) (K b))
Is0Functor (uncurry (fun (a : A) (b : E) => F (G a) (K b)))
forall a : A, Is0Functor ((fun (a0 : A) (b : E) => F (G a0) (K b)) a)
forall b : E, Is0Functor (flip (fun (a : A) (b0 : E) => F (G a) (K b0)) b)
Is0Functor (uncurry (fun (a : A) (b : E) => F (G a) (K b)))

contents: change (Is0Functor (uncurry F o functor_prod G K)).

goals.conclusion: Is0Functor (uncurry F o functor_prod G K)
forall a : A, Is0Functor ((fun (a0 : A) (b : E) => F (G a0) (K b)) a)
forall b : E, Is0Functor (flip (fun (a : A) (b0 : E) => F (G a) (K b0)) b)
Is0Functor (flip (fun (a : A) (b : E) => F (G a) (K b)) e)
Is0Functor (flip F (K e) o G)
Is1Bifunctor (fun (a : A) (b : E) => F (G a) (K b))
Is1Bifunctor (fun (a : A) (b : E) => F (G a) (K b))
Is1Functor (uncurry (fun (a : A) (b : E) => F (G a) (K b)))
forall a : A, Is1Functor ((fun (a0 : A) (b : E) => F (G a0) (K b)) a)
forall b : E, Is1Functor (flip (fun (a : A) (b0 : E) => F (G a) (K b0)) b)

forall (a0 a1 : A) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : E) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap11 (fun (a : A) (b : E) => F (G a) (K b)) f g $==
fmap01 (fun (a : A) (b : E) => F (G a) (K b)) a1 g $o
fmap10 (fun (a : A) (b : E) => F (G a) (K b)) f b0

forall (a0 a1 : A) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : E) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap11 (fun (a : A) (b : E) => F (G a) (K b)) f g $==
fmap10 (fun (a : A) (b : E) => F (G a) (K b)) f b1 $o
fmap01 (fun (a : A) (b : E) => F (G a) (K b)) a0 g
Is1Functor (uncurry (fun (a : A) (b : E) => F (G a) (K b)))

contents: change (Is1Functor (uncurry F o functor_prod G K)).

goals.conclusion: Is1Functor (uncurry F o functor_prod G K)
forall a : A, Is1Functor ((fun (a0 : A) (b : E) => F (G a0) (K b)) a)
forall b : E, Is1Functor (flip (fun (a : A) (b0 : E) => F (G a) (K b0)) b)
Is1Functor (flip (fun (a : A) (b : E) => F (G a) (K b)) e)
Is1Functor (flip F (K e) o G)

forall (a0 a1 : A) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : E) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap11 (fun (a : A) (b : E) => F (G a) (K b)) f g $==
fmap01 (fun (a : A) (b : E) => F (G a) (K b)) a1 g $o
fmap10 (fun (a : A) (b : E) => F (G a) (K b)) f b0

contents: intros a0 a1 f b0 b1 g.

goals.conclusion:
fmap11 (fun (a : A) (b : E) => F (G a) (K b)) f g $==
fmap01 (fun (a : A) (b : E) => F (G a) (K b)) a1 g $o
fmap10 (fun (a : A) (b : E) => F (G a) (K b)) f b0

contents: exact (fmap11_is_fmap01_fmap10 F (fmap G f) (fmap K g)).

goals.conclusion:
forall (a0 a1 : A) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : E) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap11 (fun (a : A) (b : E) => F (G a) (K b)) f g $==
fmap10 (fun (a : A) (b : E) => F (G a) (K b)) f b1 $o
fmap01 (fun (a : A) (b : E) => F (G a) (K b)) a0 g

contents: intros a0 a1 f b0 b1 g.

goals.conclusion:
fmap11 (fun (a : A) (b : E) => F (G a) (K b)) f g $==
fmap10 (fun (a : A) (b : E) => F (G a) (K b)) f b1 $o
fmap01 (fun (a : A) (b : E) => F (G a) (K b)) a0 g

contents: exact (fmap11_is_fmap10_fmap01 F (fmap G f) (fmap K g)).

goals.conclusion: Is0Functor (uncurry (uncurry (fun (x : A) (y : B) (z : D) => G (F x y) z)))
Is0Functor (uncurry (uncurry (fun (x : A) (y : B) (z : D) => G (F x y) z)))
Is1Functor (uncurry (uncurry (fun (x : A) (y : B) (z : D) => G (F x y) z)))
Is1Functor (uncurry (uncurry (fun (x : A) (y : B) (z : D) => G (F x y) z)))
Is0Functor (uncurry (uncurry (fun (x : C) (y : A) (z : B) => G x (F y z))))
Is0Functor (uncurry (uncurry (fun (x : C) (y : A) (z : B) => G x (F y z))))

forall a b : C * A * B,
(a $-> b) ->
uncurry (uncurry (fun (x : C) (y : A) (z : B) => G x (F y z))) a $->
uncurry (uncurry (fun (x : C) (y : A) (z : B) => G x (F y z))) b

uncurry (uncurry (fun (x : C) (y : A) (z : B) => G x (F y z))) cab $->
uncurry (uncurry (fun (x : C) (y : A) (z : B) => G x (F y z))) cab'

contents: exact (fmap11 G h (fmap11 F f g)).

goals.conclusion: Is1Functor (uncurry (uncurry (fun (x : C) (y : A) (z : B) => G x (F y z))))
Is1Functor (uncurry (uncurry (fun (x : C) (y : A) (z : B) => G x (F y z))))

forall (a b : C * A * B) (f g : a $-> b),
f $== g ->
fmap (uncurry (uncurry (fun (x : C) (y : A) (z : B) => G x (F y z)))) f $==
fmap (uncurry (uncurry (fun (x : C) (y : A) (z : B) => G x (F y z)))) g

forall a : C * A * B,

Id (uncurry (uncurry (fun (x : C) (y : A) (z : B) => G x (F y z))) a)

forall (a b c : C * A * B) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c),
fmap (uncurry (uncurry (fun (x : C) (y : A) (z : B) => G x (F y z))))
  (g $o f) $==
fmap (uncurry (uncurry (fun (x : C) (y : A) (z : B) => G x (F y z)))) g $o
fmap (uncurry (uncurry (fun (x : C) (y : A) (z : B) => G x (F y z)))) f

f $== g ->

fmap (uncurry (uncurry (fun (x : C) (y : A) (z : B) => G x (F y z)))) g

snd (fst (h, f, g)) $-> snd (fst (h', f', g'))
snd (h, f, g) $-> snd (h', f', g')

forall (a b c : C * A * B) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c),

contents:
(** ** Natural transformations between bifunctors *)

(** We can show that an uncurried natural transformation between uncurried bifunctors by composing the naturality square in each variable. *)

goals.conclusion: Is1Natural (uncurry F) (uncurry G) alpha

hypotheses.type: forall b : B, Is1Natural (flip F b) (flip G b) (fun x : A => alpha (x, b))
forall a : A, Is1Natural (F a) (G a) (fun y : B => alpha (a, y))

goals.conclusion: Is1Natural (uncurry F) (uncurry G) alpha

hypotheses.type: forall b : B, Is1Natural (flip F b) (flip G b) (fun x : A => alpha (x, b))
forall a : A, Is1Natural (F a) (G a) (fun y : B => alpha (a, y))

goals.conclusion:
forall (a a' : A * B) (f : a $-> a'),
alpha a' $o fmap (uncurry F) f $== fmap (uncurry G) f $o alpha a

hypotheses.type: forall b : B, Is1Natural (flip F b) (flip G b) (fun x : A => alpha (x, b))
forall a : A, Is1Natural (F a) (G a) (fun y : B => alpha (a, y))

contents: intros [a b] [a' b'] [f f']; cbn in *.

goals.conclusion:
alpha (a', b') $o fmap (uncurry F) (f, f') $==
fmap (uncurry G) (f, f') $o alpha (a, b)

forall b0 : B,
Is1Natural (flip F b0) (flip G b0) (fun x : A => alpha (x, b0))
forall a0 : A, Is1Natural (F a0) (G a0) (fun y : B => alpha (a0, y))

  (fmap (uncurry G) (f, f'))

forall a0 : A, Is1Natural (F a0) (G a0) (fun y : B => alpha (a0, y))

forall a0 : A, Is1Natural (F a0) (G a0) (fun y : B => alpha (a0, y))

forall a0 : A, Is1Natural (F a0) (G a0) (fun y : B => alpha (a0, y))

  (fmap01 F (fst (a', b')) f' $o fmap10 F f (snd (a, b)))
  (fmap (uncurry G) (f, f'))

forall b0 : B,
Is1Natural (flip F b0) (flip G b0) (fun x : A => alpha (x, b0))
forall a0 : A, Is1Natural (F a0) (G a0) (fun y : B => alpha (a0, y))

Square (alpha (a, b)) (alpha (a', b'))
  (fmap01 F (fst (a', b')) f' $o fmap10 F f (snd (a, b))) 
  ?Goal

forall b0 : B,
Is1Natural (flip F b0) (flip G b0) (fun x : A => alpha (x, b0))
forall a0 : A, Is1Natural (F a0) (G a0) (fun y : B => alpha (a0, y))

Square (alpha (a, b)) (alpha (a', b'))
  (fmap01 F (fst (a', b')) f' $o fmap10 F f (snd (a, b)))
  (fmap01 G (fst (a', b')) f' $o fmap10 G f (snd (a, b)))

forall b0 : B,

forall a0 : A, Is1Natural (F a0) (G a0) (fun y : B => alpha (a0, y))

contents: (** Flipping a natural transformation between bifunctors. *)

goals.conclusion:
NatTrans (uncurry F) (uncurry G) ->
NatTrans (uncurry (flip F)) (uncurry (flip G))

NatTrans (uncurry F) (uncurry G) ->
NatTrans (uncurry (flip F)) (uncurry (flip G))
NatTrans (uncurry (flip F)) (uncurry (flip G))
uncurry (flip F) $=> uncurry (flip G)
Is1Natural (uncurry (flip F)) (uncurry (flip G)) ?alpha
uncurry (flip F) $=> uncurry (flip G)

Is1Natural (uncurry (flip F)) (uncurry (flip G))
  (alpha o equiv_prod_symm B A)

forall (a a' : B * A) (f : a $-> a'),
(fun x : B * A => alpha (equiv_prod_symm B A x)) a' $o
fmap (uncurry (flip F)) f $==
fmap (uncurry (flip G)) f $o
(fun x : B * A => alpha (equiv_prod_symm B A x)) a

forall (a a' : B * A) (f : a $-> a'),
fmap (uncurry (flip G)) f $o
(fun x : B * A => alpha (equiv_prod_symm B A x)) a $==
(fun x : B * A => alpha (equiv_prod_symm B A x)) a' $o
fmap (uncurry (flip F)) f

forall (a a' : B * A) (f : a $-> a'),
(fun x : B * A => alpha (equiv_prod_symm B A x)) a' $o
fmap (uncurry (flip F)) f $==
fmap (uncurry (flip G)) f $o
(fun x : B * A => alpha (equiv_prod_symm B A x)) a

alpha (equiv_prod_symm B A (b', a')) $o fmap (uncurry (flip F)) (g, f) $==
fmap (uncurry (flip G)) (g, f) $o alpha (equiv_prod_symm B A (b, a))

forall (a a' : B * A) (f : a $-> a'),
fmap (uncurry (flip G)) f $o
(fun x : B * A => alpha (equiv_prod_symm B A x)) a $==
(fun x : B * A => alpha (equiv_prod_symm B A x)) a' $o
fmap (uncurry (flip F)) f

fmap (uncurry (flip G)) (g, f) $o alpha (equiv_prod_symm B A (b, a)) $==
alpha (equiv_prod_symm B A (b', a')) $o fmap (uncurry (flip F)) (g, f)

contents:
(** ** Opposite Bifunctors *)

(** There are a few more combinations we can do for this, such as profunctors, but we will leave those for later. *)

Instance is0bifunctor_op A B C (F : A -> B -> C) `{Is0Bifunctor A B C F}
  : Is0Bifunctor (F : A^op -> B^op -> C^op).

goals.conclusion: Is0Bifunctor (F : A^op -> B^op -> C^op)
Is0Bifunctor (F : A^op -> B^op -> C^op)
Is0Functor (uncurry F)
forall a : A^op, Is0Functor (F a)
forall b : B^op, Is0Functor (flip F b)
Is0Functor (uncurry F)
forall a : A^op, Is0Functor (F a)
Is0Functor (F a)
Is0Functor (F a)
forall b : B^op, Is0Functor (flip F b)
Is0Functor (flip F b)
Is0Functor (flip F b)

contents:
Instance is1bifunctor_op A B C (F : A -> B -> C) `{Is1Bifunctor A B C F}
  : Is1Bifunctor (F : A^op -> B^op -> C^op).

goals.conclusion: Is1Bifunctor (F : A^op -> B^op -> C^op)
Is1Bifunctor (F : A^op -> B^op -> C^op)
Is1Functor (uncurry F)
forall a : A^op, Is1Functor (F a)
forall b : B^op, Is1Functor (flip F b)

forall (a0 a1 : A^op) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B^op) 
(g : b0 $-> b1), fmap11 F f g $== fmap01 F a1 g $o fmap10 F f b0

forall (a0 a1 : A^op) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B^op) 
(g : b0 $-> b1), fmap11 F f g $== fmap10 F f b1 $o fmap01 F a0 g
Is1Functor (uncurry F)
forall a : A^op, Is1Functor (F a)
Is1Functor (F a)
Is1Functor (F a)
forall b : B^op, Is1Functor (flip F b)
Is1Functor (flip F b)
Is1Functor (flip F b)

forall (a0 a1 : A^op) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B^op) 
(g : b0 $-> b1), fmap11 F f g $== fmap01 F a1 g $o fmap10 F f b0

contents: intros a0 a1 f b0 b1 g; cbn in f, g.

goals.conclusion: fmap11 F f g $== fmap01 F a1 g $o fmap10 F f b0

forall (a0 a1 : A^op) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : B^op) 
(g : b0 $-> b1), fmap11 F f g $== fmap10 F f b1 $o fmap01 F a0 g

contents: intros a0 a1 f b0 b1 g; cbn in f, g.

goals.conclusion: fmap11 F f g $== fmap10 F f b1 $o fmap01 F a0 g

contents:
Instance is0bifunctor_op' A B C (F : A^op -> B^op -> C^op)
  `{IsGraph A, IsGraph B, IsGraph C, Fop : !Is0Bifunctor (F : A^op -> B^op -> C^op)}
  : Is0Bifunctor (F : A -> B -> C)
  := is0bifunctor_op A^op B^op C^op F.

Instance is1bifunctor_op' A B C (F : A^op -> B^op -> C^op)
  `{Is1Cat A, Is1Cat B, Is1Cat C,
    !Is0Bifunctor (F : A^op -> B^op -> C^op), !Is1Bifunctor (F : A^op -> B^op -> C^op)}
  : Is1Bifunctor (F : A -> B -> C)
  := is1bifunctor_op A^op B^op C^op F.
